briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News / TechCrunch* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their supposedly AI-powered shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News / CNBC* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings following the bankruptcy of fintech middleware company Synapse, highlighting systemic risks in the banking-as-a-service model.

- **[Finance ministers and top bankers raise serious concerns about Mythos AI model](https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c2ev24yx4rmo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss)** — *BBC Business* — Global finance ministers and banking leaders are alarmed by the Mythos AI model's unprecedented ability to identify and exploit cybersecurity vulnerabilities in financial systems.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News / Bits About Money* — A deep-dive analysis examines how open banking frameworks are reshaping competition in the payments landscape globally.

- **[Fintech is making credit cards weirder](https://workweek.com/2022/08/05/fintech-is-making-credit-cards-weirder/)** — *Hacker News / Workweek* — Fintech innovation is driving increasingly unconventional credit card products as companies compete to differentiate in a crowded market.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Inside Wealthsimple's "simple" effort to bring Canadian talent home](https://betakit.com/inside-wealthsimples-simple-effort-to-bring-canadian-talent-home/)** — *BetaKit* — Wealthsimple is actively recruiting Canadian tech and finance talent back from abroad as it scales its domestic fintech platform.

- **[Wealthsimple partners with Elon Musk's X for direct stock trading via social media](https://betakit.com/wealthsimple-partners-with-elon-musks-x-for-direct-stock-trading-via-social-media/)** — *BetaKit* — Wealthsimple has announced a partnership with X (formerly Twitter) to enable users to trade stocks directly through the social media platform.

- **[RBC, Scotiabank Scrap Emissions Targets for Oil and Gas Lending](https://financialpost.com/pmn/business-pmn/rbc-scotiabank-scrap-emissions-targets-for-oil-and-gas-lending)** — *Financial Post* — Two of Canada's largest banks, RBC and Scotiabank, have abandoned their commitments to reduce the carbon footprint of their oil and gas lending portfolios.

- **[Exclusive: Carney's pitch to unlock trillions in global investment](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/armstrong-invest-in-canada-summit-carney-9.7166810?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Prime Minister Carney is making a major push to attract large-scale global investment into Canada at a high-profile investment summit.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News / FinLedger* — *(Relevant context)* Canada's early open banking roadmap — which flagged screen scraping as insecure and set regulatory targets — remains important background as the country's open banking framework continues to evolve.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[SAGA Metals Secures Maximum JEA Grant for Labrador and Adopts Semi-Annual Financial Reporting](https://financialpost.com/globe-newswire/saga-metals-secures-maximum-jea-grant-for-labrador-and-adopts-semi-annual-financial-reporting)** — *Financial Post* — Vancouver-based SAGA Metals has secured a maximum Joint Exploitation Agreement grant for its Labrador exploration operations, spotlighting continued resource investment in Atlantic Canada.

- **[Mistral Venture Partners sets up shop in Alberta](https://betakit.com/mistral-venture-partners-sets-up-shop-in-alberta/)** — *BetaKit* — A new venture capital firm is establishing a presence in Alberta, reflecting a broader trend of regional VC ecosystem-building in Canada that Atlantic fintech advocates may look to replicate.

- **[Canada opens applications to build a public AI supercomputer](https://betakit.com/canada-opens-applications-to-build-a-public-ai-supercomputer/)** — *BetaKit* — Canada is inviting applications to develop a national public AI supercomputer, a infrastructure investment that could benefit Atlantic Canadian fintech and tech startups seeking compute resources.
